name: Hulic Co., Ltd.
summary: Hulic Co., Ltd. engages in the investment, development, rental, sale, and brokerage of real estate properties in Japan. The company operates through two segments, Real Estate and Insurance. Its property portfolio includes office buildings, commercial buildings, residential and retail properties, hotels, and others. As of December 31, 2019, the company had a portfolio of approximately 254 lease properties. It also engages in the asset management and insurance agency businesses. Hulic Co., Ltd. was founded in 1957 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
